components.text:
Hello,

Great chance to convert all your Old Loans into one single loan.

Consolidate your debt with a Personal loan up to {{1}} at {{2}}%.

{{3}} offering you,

PRE-APPROVED PERSONAL LOAN

Offer Amount: {{4}}, EMI: {{5}}/-
Tenure: {{6}} years
Amount will be credited to salary account: {{7}}/-
Rate of interest: {{8}}% Reducing
Processing fee: {{9}}/-
Annual Maintenance Charges: {{10}}/-
Stamp duty: {{11}}/-
Pre-closer & Part-Payment: {{12}}/-

Within {{13}} working days, the amount will be credited (disbursed) after login.

Documents Required:
1) Latest 3 months salary slip
2) Latest 3 months salary bank statement
3) Pan Card
4) Aadhaar Card
5) Address Proof

If you wish to proceed, click below.

TO STOP MESSAGES, REPLY NOT-INTERESTED

NO KYC DOCUMENT IS REQUIRED FOR SALARY ACCOUNT HOLDERS
